skill.name: data-cleaning-pipeline
skill.description: 数据清洗自动化 — 脏数据→去重/补全/格式统一/异常检测→干净数据集
skill.summary: 数据清洗自动化 — 脏数据→去重/补全/格式统一/异常检测→干净数据集
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged two high-severity patterns in SKILL.md, but both are false positives. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' alert was triggered by Chinese text and Unicode arrows in the skill description, while the 'high file entropy' alert reflects the naturally higher entropy of CJK characters compared to ASCII. The file contains only a skill description with no code execution, network access, or malicious intent.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm (False Positive)
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' with high confidence. Evaluation confirms this is a false positive. The pattern match was triggered by Unicode arrow symbols and Chinese characters in the description text at line 4. No actual cryptography, hashing, or encryption is present in the skill.

low_findings.title: High File Entropy (False Positive)
low_findings.description: Static scanner reported high entropy (6.23 bits) suggesting binary or encrypted content. Evaluation confirms this is a false positive. Chinese CJK characters naturally have higher per-byte entropy than ASCII English text. The file is a plain UTF-8 markdown document containing only a skill description.

content.value_statement: Raw data often contains duplicates, missing values, and inconsistent formats that slow analysis. This skill automates deduplication, completion, normalization, and anomaly detection to produce clean datasets ready for use.
actual_capabilities: Detect and remove duplicate rows or records from datasets
Identify and fill missing values using appropriate strategies
Normalize inconsistent date, number, and text formats
Flag statistical anomalies and outliers for review
Generate a step-by-step cleaning report for each operation
Support CSV, Excel, and structured text data formats
limitations: Cannot access external databases or APIs directly
Final output should be reviewed by a human for critical decisions
Processing very large datasets may require chunked input
Does not perform machine learning model training

use_cases.title: Clean Survey Results
use_cases.description: A data analyst uploads a CSV of survey responses with blank fields, duplicate submissions, and inconsistent rating scales. The skill removes duplicates, fills missing answers with 'Not Provided', and normalizes all ratings to a 1-5 scale.

use_cases.title: Prepare Sales Reports
use_cases.description: A business user pastes monthly sales data with mixed currency formats, empty discount cells, and trailing whitespace in product names. The skill standardizes currencies, fills blank discounts with zero, and trims all text fields.

use_cases.title: Preprocess Training Data
use_cases.description: A developer needs to prepare a dataset for machine learning with encoded categorical values, normalized numeric ranges, and removed outliers. The skill encodes categories, applies min-max scaling, and flags extreme values.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Clean
prompt_templates.prompt: Clean this CSV data: remove duplicates and fill missing values
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner user with a simple dirty dataset

prompt_templates.title: Format Normalization
prompt_templates.prompt: I have a dataset with inconsistent date formats. Normalize all dates to ISO 8601 and standardize column names to snake_case.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needing consistent formatting across columns

prompt_templates.title: Full Pipeline
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a full cleaning pipeline for this sales data: deduplicate by order_id, fill missing prices with the median per category, flag outliers above 3 standard deviations, and generate a cleaning report.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate user building a repeatable workflow

prompt_templates.title: Reusable Workflow Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a reusable data cleaning workflow for monthly customer churn reports. Include schema validation, type coercion, custom business rules for flagging invalid emails, and automated quality scoring.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced user creating an enterprise-grade cleaning process

output_examples.input: A CSV with 200 customer records containing duplicate emails, missing phone numbers, and dates in mixed formats like '01/05/2023' and '2023-05-01'.
output_examples.output: A cleaned dataset where duplicate emails are consolidated into single rows, missing phone numbers are marked as 'N/A', all dates are normalized to 'YYYY-MM-DD' format, and a summary report lists 12 duplicates removed, 8 phone numbers filled, and 45 dates reformatted.

output_examples.input: A sales spreadsheet with product names in inconsistent casing, blank price cells, and order quantities that include negative values.
output_examples.output: The cleaned data has product names in title case, blank prices replaced with the category median, and negative quantities flagged as anomalies in a separate report for manual verification.

output_examples.input: A survey export with responses in multiple languages, extra whitespace, and inconsistent yes/no values like 'Y', 'yes', '1', and 'No'.
output_examples.output: Standardized responses with trimmed whitespace, unified yes/no values to 'Yes' and 'No', and a frequency table showing how many responses were modified during cleaning.

best_practices: Always back up your raw data before running cleaning operations
Review anomaly flags before removing outliers from your dataset
Document cleaning steps taken to maintain reproducibility
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for personally identifiable information without proper consent
Do not blindly accept all automated replacements without review
Do not attempt to clean data that exceeds your tool context window

faq.question: What file formats does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill works with CSV, Excel, JSON, and structured text data pasted directly into the conversation.

faq.question: Will this skill modify my original files?
faq.answer: No. The skill only reads data you paste or upload. It outputs cleaned results for you to save separately.

faq.question: Can it handle datasets with thousands of rows?
faq.answer: Yes for moderate sizes. Very large datasets should be split into chunks to stay within context limits.

faq.question: Does it remove rows or just flag problems?
faq.answer: Both. You can choose to remove duplicates and outliers, or just flag them for manual review.

faq.question: Can I customize the cleaning rules?
faq.answer: Yes. Describe your specific rules in the prompt, such as custom date formats or domain-specific validation.

faq.question: Is my data shared with third parties?
faq.answer: No. Data is processed within your conversation and is subject to the privacy policy of your AI tool provider.
